evidenceReviewed.source: OpenSpec artifacts: proposal, design, tasks, specs, README updates.
evidenceReviewed.summary: OpenSpec artifacts: proposal, design, tasks, specs, README updates.

evidenceReviewed.source: Tool outputs / validation: `npm run validate:strict`, `npm test`, `openspec validate --all`, and `npm run autopilot:validate -- openspec/changes/autopilot-live-regression/automation/task.json` passed on 2026-06-12.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Tool outputs / validation: `npm run validate:strict`, `npm test`, `openspec validate --all`, and `npm run autopilot:validate -- openspec/changes/autopilot-live-regression/automation/task.json` passed on 2026-06-12.

evidenceReviewed.source: Reviewer gates: `code-quality-reviewer`, `test-coverage-reviewer`, `instruction-artifact-reviewer`, and targeted architecture rechecks passed after fixes.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Reviewer gates: `code-quality-reviewer`, `test-coverage-reviewer`, `instruction-artifact-reviewer`, and targeted architecture rechecks passed after fixes.

evidenceReviewed.source: Autopilot/runtime events: `autopilot_run_next` returned `ready_runtime_deferred`, so implementation continued manually without protected Autopilot state edits.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Autopilot/runtime events: `autopilot_run_next` returned `ready_runtime_deferred`, so implementation continued manually without protected Autopilot state edits.

problems.problem: Report path boundary was too broad
problems.evidence: Code-quality review found `--report` could overwrite arbitrary repo files
problems.impact: Evidence generation could clobber source or docs
problems.rootCause: Report writer accepted generic repository paths instead of a narrow approved report target
problems.recommendation: Constrain report writes to new files under the matching change outside automation paths and test blocked paths
problems.noFollowUpReason: Constrain report writes to new files under the matching change outside automation paths and test blocked paths

problems.problem: Reviewer routing missed git status signals
problems.evidence: Reviewer recheck found CLI collect did not derive changed files from full git status and missed `instructions/**`
problems.impact: Evidence packs could omit required reviewer gates
problems.rootCause: Reviewer routing was derived from limited artifact signals instead of the complete changed-path set
problems.recommendation: Use full porcelain changed paths and add git-status tests for tools and instruction artifacts
problems.noFollowUpReason: Use full porcelain changed paths and add git-status tests for tools and instruction artifacts

problems.problem: Report contract sections needed stronger proof
problems.evidence: Coverage review requested Tool Smoke, Findings, Follow-Up, Validation, Reviewer Gates, Residual Risks, and Ready-To-Land sections
problems.impact: Reports could be incomplete for archive review
problems.rootCause: Markdown report output lacked schema-like section assertions for reviewer-critical evidence
problems.recommendation: Add deterministic Markdown sections and assertions
problems.noFollowUpReason: Add deterministic Markdown sections and assertions

archiveGate.reason: Evidence reviewed, findings fixed, reviewer rechecks clean, and validation passed
